node_types.description: A model or framework for delivering therapy, including its theoretical basis, guiding principles, and adaptation to Islamic and cultural contexts.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the therapeutic approach or model

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the approach and its core features

properties.name: islamic_integration_level
properties.description: Degree and method of Islamic integration (e.g., filter, integrationist, convert approach)

properties.name: core_principles
properties.description: Key guiding principles (e.g., fidelity, flexibility, evidence-based practice)

node_types.description: A religious, spiritual, or ethical concept from Islamic tradition relevant to therapy (e.g., tawakkul, sabr, shukr, akhlaq).

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the Islamic concept

properties.name: definition
properties.description: Explanation or definition of the concept

properties.name: category
properties.description: Type of concept (e.g., spiritual practice, ethical value, explanatory model)

properties.name: source_text
properties.description: Primary Islamic source (e.g., Qur’an, Hadith, scholarly consensus)

node_types.description: A specific intervention, strategy, or technique used in therapy, including Islamically modified or adapted CBT techniques.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the technique

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the technique and its purpose

properties.name: islamic_modification
properties.description: Details of how the technique is adapted to Islamic context

properties.name: evidence_base
properties.description: Summary of supporting evidence or rationale

node_types.description: A cultural, family, or community factor relevant to therapy, including stigma, hospitality, language, and family roles.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the cultural factor

properties.name: description
properties.description: Explanation of the factor and its relevance

properties.name: domain
properties.description: Domain (e.g., family, community, language, stigma)

node_types.description: A specific act of worship or religious practice relevant to therapy (e.g., prayer, dua, dhikr, fasting).

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the religious practice

properties.name: description
properties.description: Explanation of the practice

properties.name: therapeutic_role
properties.description: How the practice is used or referenced in therapy

node_types.description: A model or framework for understanding mental health, integrating Islamic and psychological perspectives.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the explanatory model

properties.name: description
properties.description: Summary of the model

properties.name: islamic_basis
properties.description: Islamic sources or concepts underpinning the model

properties.name: psychological_basis
properties.description: Psychological theories or constructs included

node_types.description: A skill, knowledge area, or competency required for therapists to deliver Islamically aligned therapy.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the competency

properties.name: description
properties.description: Explanation of the competency

properties.name: domain
properties.description: Domain (e.g., cultural, religious, clinical, ethical)

node_types.description: A de-identified clinical case or scenario illustrating the application of Islamically Modified CBT.

properties.name: case_id
properties.description: Unique identifier or pseudonym for the case

properties.name: presenting_problem
properties.description: Summary of the client's presenting issue

properties.name: islamic_cultural_factors
properties.description: Relevant Islamic or cultural factors in the case

properties.name: interventions_used
properties.description: Therapeutic techniques or approaches applied

node_types.description: A source text, research article, or scholarly work cited as evidence or guidance for Islamically aligned therapy.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title of the source

properties.name: author
properties.description: Author(s) of the source

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of source (e.g., Qur’an, Hadith, research article, guideline)

properties.name: relevance
properties.description: How the source informs therapy or the schema

edge_types.description: Indicates that a therapeutic approach incorporates or is informed by a specific Islamic concept.
Indicates that a therapeutic approach includes or recommends a specific therapeutic technique.
Indicates that a therapeutic technique is modified or adapted using a specific Islamic concept.
Indicates that a therapeutic technique incorporates or references a specific religious practice.
Indicates that a therapeutic approach addresses or adapts to a specific cultural, family, or community factor.
Indicates that a therapeutic approach is based on or utilizes a specific explanatory model of mental health.
Indicates that a specific therapist competency is required to deliver a therapeutic approach.
Indicates that a case example illustrates the use of a specific therapeutic technique.
Indicates that a case example highlights the relevance of a specific cultural, family, or community factor.
Indicates that a case example demonstrates the application of a specific Islamic concept.
Indicates that a reference source informs or supports a therapeutic approach.
Indicates that a reference source informs or supports a therapeutic technique.
Indicates that a reference source informs or supports an Islamic concept.
